name: Catalyst
description: Partnership Leaders' flagship conference for partnership professionals. Covers ecosystem strategy, co-selling motions, partner program design, and career development.

name: Supernode
description: Crossbeam's conference on ecosystem-led growth. Covers account mapping, partner data sharing, co-selling workflows, and the future of partner ecosystems.

name: PartnerStack Summit
description: PartnerStack's annual summit focused on partner program management. Covers referral programs, affiliate partnerships, and marketplace strategy for SaaS companies.

name: Impartner Summit
description: Impartner's user conference for PRM and channel management professionals. Covers partner portal design, deal registration, MDF management, and channel automation.

name: Channel Partners Conference
description: The largest channel-focused conference in the IT industry. Covers channel sales strategy, MSP partnerships, distribution, and vendor-partner relationship management.

name: CompTIA ChannelCon
description: CompTIA's annual channel event covering IT channel partnerships, MSP business models, vendor relationship management, and technology certifications.

name: CRN Channel Chiefs
description: Gathering of channel leadership from top IT vendors and partners. Focuses on channel program innovation, vendor strategy, and partner ecosystem development.

name: Partner Ecosystem Summit
description: Research-driven summit on the future of partner ecosystems. Covers ecosystem analytics, channel economics, and the shift from traditional channel to ecosystem models.

name: SaaStr Annual
description: The largest SaaS conference with growing partnership tracks. Covers partner-led growth, ecosystem strategy, and the role of partnerships in SaaS scaling.

name: Dreamforce (Partner Track)
description: Salesforce's massive conference with dedicated partner tracks. Essential for ISV partners, SI firms, and anyone building on the Salesforce AppExchange ecosystem.

name: Cloud Marketplace Summit
description: Focused on cloud marketplace strategy across AWS, Azure, and GCP. Covers marketplace listing optimization, co-sell programs, and procurement-driven partnerships.

name: Pavilion Summit
description: Pavilion's flagship event for go-to-market leaders. Growing partnership content covering partner-led revenue, ecosystem strategy, and cross-functional alignment.
